response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile full-stack and systems engineer with ~15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend work, plus founder-level entrepreneurial experience via GISCollective and a clear track record of inspiring others through talks and workshops. However, this is a Director-level Principal role centered on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms. His AI exposure is recent and infrastructure-level (MCP code generators, agentic tooling) rather than recognized, customer-facing AI products, and his career has been senior IC rather than director-level strategic leadership. He's worth a conversation but is not a clear fit for the AI-strategy seniority bar.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record founding and running the open-source GISCollective platform
Strong record of inspiring/sharing via conference talks, courses, and workshops
concerns: AI/ML experience is recent and infrastructure-level; no recognized AI products or platforms
Career is senior IC rather than director-level strategic leadership or customer advisory
No advanced degree in an AI field and limited cloud/AI strategy depth for this seniority

key_factors.factor: Breadth and depth of engineering experience
Below director-level scope and strategic advisory experience
